# Shine Project Instructions

Use `.agents/rules` and `.agents/skills` as the source of truth.

- Never edit `RobustToolbox/**`.
- Put new Shine code under `_sh`.
- Mark any non-`_sh` file edit with `shine-edit start` / `shine-edit end`.
- Keep changes narrow, predicted where possible, localized, modular, and data-driven.
